title: Makara Nedunkuzhai Kannan Temple
tagline: Makara Nedunkuzhai Kannan Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Makara Nedunkuzhai Kannan Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Makara Nedunkuḻaikathar Temple is one of the Nava Tirupathi, nine Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu located Thenthiruperai along Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route, Tamil Nadu, Indi
overview.description: The Makara Nedunkuḻaikathar Temple is one of the Nava Tirupathi, nine Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu located Thenthiruperai along Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route, Tamil Nadu, India in the southern bank of Thamiraparani river. It is located 5 km from Alvar Thirunagari All these 9 temples are classified as Divya Desams, the 108 temples of Vishnu revered by the 12 poet saints, or Alvars. The temple is referred to as Sukra sthalam, a location for the planet deity, Sukra. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieva

topPlaces.name: Thenthiruperai
topPlaces.description: Thenthiruperai is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, 11 km from Tiruvaikuntam and 30 km from Thoothukudi. The village hosts one of the nine Nava Tirupathi temples.

topPlaces.name: Kurangani
topPlaces.description: Kurangani is a hill station atop the Western Ghats accessed from Bodinayakkanur in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kurangani literally means "the place which wears monkeys as its jewels" in Tamil.

topPlaces.name: Kallamparai
topPlaces.description: Kallamparai is a small village located in the Tuticorin district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) west of Tiruchendur and 35 kilometres (22 mi) east of Tirunelveli.

topPlaces.name: Kottaikkadu
topPlaces.description: Kottaikkadu is a small village in Tuticorin district (Tamil Nadu), belongs to Srivaikundam Taluk and Siruthonda Nallore panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Eral
topPlaces.description: Eral is a town in the Tuticorin district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Irattai Thiruppathy
topPlaces.description: Irattai Tirupati Temples refer to two temples of the Nava Tirupati, namely, the Devapiran temple and Aravindalochanar temple, which are dedicated to Vishnu. They are part of the nine "Divya Desams" located along the Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route in Tamil Nadu, India on the banks of Thamiraparani river.

topPlaces.name: Srinivasa Perumal Temple, Tirukulandhai
topPlaces.description: Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple or Sri Mayakoothar Permual Temple is one of the Nava Tirupatis, nine Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu located Perungulam along Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route, Tamil Nadu, India in the southern bank of Thamiraparani river. It is located 5 km from Alvar Thirunagari.

topPlaces.name: Pattakkarai
topPlaces.description: Pattakkarai is a small village situated near Nazareth in the Thoothukudi District of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located on the road from Nazareth, which is 4 km away, to Tiruchendur.

items.note: Thenthiruperai is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, 11 km from Tiruvaikuntam and 30 km from Thoothukudi. The village hosts one of the nine Nava Tirupathi temples.
Kurangani is a hill station atop the Western Ghats accessed from Bodinayakkanur in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Kurangani literally means "the place which wears monkeys as its jewels" in Tamil.
Kallamparai is a small village located in the Tuticorin district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is about 15 kilometres (9.3 mi) west of Tiruchendur and 35 kilometres (22 mi) east of Tirunelveli.
Kottaikkadu is a small village in Tuticorin district (Tamil Nadu), belongs to Srivaikundam Taluk and Siruthonda Nallore panchayat.
Eral is a town in the Tuticorin district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

Irattai Tirupati Temples refer to two temples of the Nava Tirupati, namely, the Devapiran temple and Aravindalochanar temple, which are dedicated to Vishnu. They are part of the nine "Divya Desams" located along the Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route in Tamil Nadu, India on the banks of Thamiraparani river.

items.note: Sri Srinivasa Perumal Temple or Sri Mayakoothar Permual Temple is one of the Nava Tirupatis, nine Hindu temples dedicated to Vishnu located Perungulam along Tiruchendur-Tirunelveli route, Tamil Nadu, India in the southern bank of Thamiraparani river. It is located 5 km from Alvar Thirunagari.
Pattakkarai is a small village situated near Nazareth in the Thoothukudi District of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located on the road from Nazareth, which is 4 km away, to Tiruchendur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Makara Nedunkuzhai Kannan Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Makara Nedunkuzhai Kannan Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Makara Nedunkuzhai Kannan Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (120 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (116 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Makara Nedunkuzhai Kannan Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Makara Nedunkuzhai Kannan Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Makara Nedunkuzhai Kannan Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Makara Nedunkuzhai Kannan Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Makara Nedunkuzhai Kannan Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thenthiruperai, Kurangani, Kallamparai, Kottaikkadu, Eral.
